title: AntiVPN | 1.20.1
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc52d8173905ace9e6072399272e16f97837ab90.png)
<details>
<summary>Text Alternative</summary>

AntiVPN
by ri1_

Yet Another AntiVPN plugin


Command :

/ipinfo <ip> - Get information about an ip address

Permissions :

antivpn.bypass - Bypass the AntiVPN
antivpn.ipinfo - Use the ipinfo command

Screenshots :


![You can't connect when using a vpn](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1083429134409158697/1143702706637263058/upload_2023-8-23_1-2-31-png.png)

![ipinfo command](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1083429134409158697/1143702993775120475/upload_2023-8-23_1-2-49-png.png)


This plugin uses http://ip-api.com/ to check ips.

Not affiliated with ip-api.com


</details>
